headline: SUIT UP AND SCORE: CHIPOTLE BRINGS BACK ITS HOCKEY JERSEY BOGO FOR THE 2026 STANLEY CUP PLAYOFFS-AND DROPS FIRST-EVER LIMITED-EDITION JERSEY
summary: NEWPORT BEACH, Calif-- Chipotle Mexican Grill is bringing back its Hockey Jersey BOGO for the sixth consecutive year as the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs get underway. On Monday, April 20, after 3 p.m....

headline: A look at how Chipotle’s loyalty relaunch could affect customer behavior
summary: Value is a major component of the loyalty revamp, and the approach could drive in-restaurant traffic and help the company win over less frequent customers.
